title: Trafigura Signs 13-Year Natural Gas Offtake Deal With NuVista Energy
content: Trafigura has signed a 13-year natural gas supply agreement with NuVista Energy, which will provide 21,000 metric million British thermal units per day starting January 1, 2027. The price will be tied to the Japan Korea Marker (JKM), linking NuVista's Alberta Deep Basin production to global LNG markets. This deal enables NuVista's first entry into world LNG markets and aligns with a broader trend of Montney producers securing LNG access. The agreement reflects increased Canadian interest in LNG exports, as Canada anticipates its first LNG terminals coming online soon.
author: Analysts Account
